return(function(I,B,D,e,A,K,T,g,V,j,o,P,W,s,Z,O,l,i,f,M,d)j,s,W,g,i,o,V,d,M,l,P,f,Z,O=function(I,t)local B=M(t)local D=function(...)return g(I,{...},t,B)end return D end,function(I,t)local B=M(t)local D=function(D)return g(I,{D},t,B)end return D end,function(I,t)local B=M(t)local D=function(D,e)return g(I,{D;e},t,B)end return D end,function(g,D,e,A)local
